title: Diksha Devi
parsed_text:
Diksha Devi
Senior Data Scientist - ML & Semantic AI
7+ Years | Python | NLP | Azure Databricks | Semantic Search | RAG | MLflow
PROFILE
Senior Data Scientist with 7+ years of experience building end-to-end machine learning, NLP and analytics solutions across healthcare, publishing, SaaS and marketplace domains. Hands-on expertise in Python, Azure Databricks, PySpark, MLflow, Azure Synapse and Snowflake, with experience spanning data preparation, feature engineering, model development, tuning, deployment and monitoring. Skilled in classification, regression, clustering, topic modelling, semantic matching, sentence embeddings, dense and sparse retrieval, vector search and RAG-based applications. Strong collaborator with data engineering, product and business teams, delivering scalable proof-of-concept and production-ready solutions with measurable relevance, accuracy and operational performance.
CORE TECHNICAL SKILLS
Machine Learning & Model Lifecycle | Semantic AI, NLP & Retrieval | Azure Data & MLOps Platforms | Applied AI, Delivery & Optimization
• Python / scikit-learn • Feature Engineering • Classification / Regression • Clustering / Segmentation • MLflow Tracking / Registry • Hyperparameter Tuning • Model Evaluation / Metrics • Forecasting / Time Series • Model Monitoring • Experiment Design | • NLP / Text Preprocessing • Sentence Transformers / SBERT • Bi-Encoder / Cross-Encoder • Cosine / Dot-Product Similarity • Dense / Sparse Retrieval • RAG / Retrieval QA • LDA Topic Modelling • FAISS / Chroma DB • Azure AI Search • Recommendation / Ranking | • Azure Databricks / PySpark • Azure Synapse Analytics • Snowflake / Spark SQL • DBT • ADLS Gen2 / Delta Lake • Azure Data Factory • Distributed Model Pipelines • MLflow Model Lifecycle • REST APIs / FastAPI • SQL / Python Data Pipelines • Git / Azure DevOps CI/CD | • Semantic Search POCs • Audience Segmentation • Content Recommendation • Search Relevance Analysis • Dynamic Input Handling • Large Dataset Optimization • Data Quality / Validation • Cloud Workload Migration • Stakeholder Collaboration • Production Support / RCA
PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE
Senior Data Scientist - ML & Semantic AI
Designed and executed end-to-end machine learning pipelines covering data extraction, preprocessing, exploratory analysis, feature engineering, model training, hyperparameter tuning, validation, deployment and ongoing performance monitoring.
Developed classification, regression and clustering solutions in Python using scalable feature pipelines, robust evaluation frameworks and business-aligned metrics for customer, content, operational and forecasting use cases.
Built semantic matching and recommendation workflows using sentence embeddings, cosine similarity, dot-product scoring and bi-encoder or cross-encoder patterns to improve audience segmentation, content discovery and search relevance.
Developed and evaluated domain-adapted embedding approaches using sentence-transformer models, including dimensionality, latency, storage and retrieval trade-offs for large text corpora and dynamic inputs.
Engineered dense and sparse retrieval pipelines and RAG-based applications using vector-search patterns with FAISS, Chroma DB and Azure AI Search concepts, improving retrieval quality and grounded response generation.
Created and optimized LDA topic-modelling workflows for high-cluster-count datasets through text normalization, vocabulary control, hyperparameter tuning, coherence analysis and cluster-quality validation.
Built scalable Data and ML pipelines using Azure Databricks, PySpark, Azure Synapse and Snowflake, with MLflow-based experiment tracking, model versioning, reproducibility and lifecycle controls.
Migrated native Python and cloud-based analytical workloads to distributed Azure Databricks compute, improving execution efficiency through partitioning, caching, vectorized processing, execution-plan review and compute tuning.
Developed proof-of-concept solutions for semantic search, retrieval QA, recommendation and predictive analytics, converting client requirements into measurable experiments, reusable components and deployment-ready designs.
Partnered with data engineers, data scientists, architects and business stakeholders to define data contracts, model objectives, acceptance criteria, deployment plans and monitoring strategies for production ML solutions.
Implemented testing, data-quality validation, observability, root-cause analysis and model-performance reviews, while providing technical guidance through code reviews, documentation and production support.
PROJECT EXPERIENCE
NEJM - New England Journal of Medicine | Semantic Content Intelligence & Recommendation
Designed NLP and semantic-analysis pipelines for journal content, subscriptions, engagement events and audience attributes, creating feature-ready datasets in Azure Databricks and Snowflake for recommendation and segmentation use cases.
Developed content-similarity and discovery approaches using text preprocessing, embeddings, topic signals and engagement features to support article recommendation, search ranking and personalized audience experiences.
Built evaluation datasets, relevance metrics, data-quality checks and stakeholder reporting to validate recommendation performance, monitor content coverage and support regulated production analytics.
Cerina | Conversational AI, Retrieval QA & Patient Journey Analytics
Integrated patient interactions, chatbot sessions, intake forms, knowledge content, APIs and application tables into governed ML-ready datasets using Python, PySpark, SQL and Azure Databricks processing.
Developed intent, similarity and retrieval workflows for conversational use cases, using semantic matching and Retrieval QA patterns to connect user questions with relevant healthcare knowledge and support content.
Created feature engineering and model-evaluation pipelines for journey classification, engagement analysis and drop-off detection, with validation gates, monitoring, exception handling and privacy-aware access controls.
Delivered proof-of-concept designs, source mappings, experiment results and stakeholder-ready recommendations while collaborating with product and engineering teams on model integration and operationalization.
Journal Watch | Topic Modelling, Audience Segmentation & Content Discovery
Built NLP pipelines for article, newsletter and readership data, applying text normalization, LDA topic modelling and clustering techniques to identify content themes, audience interests and engagement patterns.
Developed embedding-based similarity and recommendation features to connect readers with relevant clinical content, balancing semantic relevance, behavioral signals, retrieval latency and content diversity.
Created repeatable model-evaluation, monitoring and reporting datasets in Databricks and Snowflake, supporting relevance analysis, segment validation and production issue investigation.
WSR - We Sell Restaurants | Predictive Modelling, Segmentation & Forecasting
Developed classification and regression features for lead quality, opportunity conversion and marketplace performance using CRM, listing, campaign and behavioral data processed through Python, SQL and Databricks pipelines.
Applied clustering and segmentation approaches to group customers, listings and market activity, supporting targeted engagement, trend analysis and data-driven prioritization across sales and franchise workflows.
Built forecasting and performance-analysis datasets for demand, pipeline movement and conversion trends, with reusable transformations, model validation, data-quality controls and stakeholder dashboards.
Tavlo AI | RAG, Semantic Search & ML Product Analytics
Designed ML-ready pipelines for AI workflow activity, prompts, responses, user behavior, feature adoption and failed executions using Python, APIs, event data and Azure Databricks processing.
Developed semantic retrieval and RAG evaluation patterns for knowledge-driven product experiences, including embedding generation, similarity scoring, chunking, vector storage and retrieval-quality analysis.
Built MLflow-ready experimentation and monitoring datasets to compare model or retrieval configurations, track quality and latency measures, and support reproducible promotion of successful approaches.
Collaborated with product and engineering teams to improve recommendation quality, chatbot retrieval, workflow completion and cloud efficiency through structured experimentation, RCA and performance optimization.
EDUCATION
Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science / Eternal University (H.P.)
Diploma in Computer Science, Govt. Polytechnic for Women Kandaghat (H.P.)
